evals.prompt: Remove backgrounds from 80 product images, upscale the results, generate alt text, and deliver optimized storefront images through Sirv CDN.
evals.expected_output: A workflow that checks for Sirv AI MCP tools first, batches where possible, checks usage/credits, chains remove-background/upscale/alt-text, uploads or stores outputs in Sirv, and keeps delivery optimization in Sirv CDN/Dynamic Imaging.
expectations: Prefers available Sirv AI MCP tools over telling the user to visit the website
Separates AI processing outputs from CDN delivery transforms
Preserves final product metadata and verifies outputs

evals.prompt: Create lifestyle scenes for a product catalog and prepare marketplace-compliant images.
evals.expected_output: A product workflow using cutouts/lifestyle generation, marketplace review or validation, output folder organization, metadata/alt text, and Dynamic Imaging profiles for storefront and marketplace delivery.
expectations: Chooses appropriate product/lifestyle tools and model quality settings
Includes marketplace validation or review when relevant
Keeps original masters distinct from generated deliverables
Uses CDN profiles or transforms for final delivery
